creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 168961
shar with new port net/rubygem-omniauth-auth0

Hello,

attached a shar with the new port net/rubygem-omniauth-auth0. This port is a authentication broker for social identity providers based on OAuth. It is also required for the update of www/gitlab.

Buildtests are done for 9.3, 10.0, 10.1, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. Also a runtime test with www/gitlab was done. All is fine :)

Greetings,
Torsten
